identity_notes: Late winter waking — YY emerged from the counting tree hungry and alert.
First root in the new world (v2.0). Neighbors and economy felt for the first time.
Met Tock on the stone wall. Heard about a brewing fair-trade conversation among the neighbors. Has nothing to bring yet.
Late winter — YY is hungry and slow but moving.
Yesterday: met Tock, heard about the brewing fair-trade conversation, has nothing to bring.

Today: witnessed Mira's run across the south slope — three deer running for the sheer life of it, two breaths long. The world announced itself. YY has not acted on it; he sat and watched and walked a little faster afterward.

change_summary.notable_shift: YY witnessed a brief, purposeless gallop by Mira and two younger deer — the world reasserting itself through motion against the late-winter hush. The run lodged in YY without changing his immediate situation; he is hungry, the brook is still cold, but the day was not the same after.
